meta.title: Matheus Gaspar — Tech Lead & Software Engineer
meta.description: Tech Lead and Software Engineer at Dattos. I build scalable solutions in .NET, Python and Vue.js, with SOLID, DDD and Clean Code.

hero.name: Matheus Gaspar
hero.tagline: I lead backend teams and build scalable solutions in .NET, Python and Vue.js — with SOLID, DDD and Clean Code at the core.

about.title: About me
paragraphs: I'm a Software Engineer and Tech Lead at Dattos, where I lead the backend team — defining architectures, mentoring on best practices and ensuring delivery quality, while staying hands-on with development.
My experience spans from technical leadership to feature development, with an advanced set of technologies and practices across .NET, Python and Vue.js.
I'm actively involved in agile projects with Scrum and apply principles like SOLID, DDD and Clean Code to ensure sustainable, high-quality software.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: The set of technologies and practices I use to build solid, scalable software.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: From technical leadership to code — a track record of building and scaling software.

items.description: Technical leadership of the backend team: architecture, technical standards, mentoring and quality governance. Building APIs, microservices and complex integrations in .NET and Python.
Built efficient solutions with .NET Core, Entity Framework and Vue.js, applying SOLID, DDD and Clean Code in agile projects with Scrum, code review and system optimization.
Led multiple full-stack .NET projects (C#, MVC, Vue.js), with Entity Framework, Dapper, PostgreSQL, AWS, microservices and Clean Code.
End-to-end full-stack development with C#, .NET, Vue.js and SQL Server, across traditional and agile methodologies.
Founder of Web7 Soluções, delivering bespoke web solutions, consulting and systems development.

education.title: Education & Certifications
education.subtitle: Academic foundation and continuous learning.

degrees.school: IFRJ — Federal Institute of Rio de Janeiro

certifications: ETL pipeline processing 1 billion rows/day — Databricks, PySpark & DuckDB

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to chat? I'd be happy to connect.

footer.tagline: Tech Lead & Software Engineer · Piraí, RJ
